================
THE CARDS
CHANGELOG
NOVEMBER 23,2015
================





BETA 01 - BETA 99 (versions 00.00.01.YYMMDD - 00.00.99.YYMMDD)
-----------------


ALPHA 01 - ALPHA XX
--------------------
The Alpha version of The Cards spanned a few months, and was used to build the foundation of the application. Since
everything was in flux during the alpha versions, a changelog was not kept.
